phase-plan.purpose: Define observability/operations baseline for feature-flagged AI rollout so teams can detect failures and recover without code rollback.
phase-plan.scope: Flag source visibility, flag audit metadata, kill-switch behavior, and minimum status reporting. Out of scope: full analytics backend integration.

decision.summary: Expose active flag sources/defaults in admin status and require auditable change metadata.
decision.impact: Improves operational safety and fast rollback confidence.

suggestion.gap: REQUIREMENTS.xml does not explicitly require flag-change audits and source precedence documentation.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement for flag source precedence (`defaults < local < env`) plus audit logs for flag state transitions.
